HOME_MENU_confirm-new: Creating a new game delete the current one, are you sure?
GLOBAL_intro_title: Welcome to the DarkBlue Dungeon game
GLOBAL_intro: DarkBlue Dragon is a classic turn-based RPG, with minimalist graphics, it focuses on your imagination and reading. There is a game narrator who will tell you what is going on and you will only have the possibility (by multiple ways) to interact with him. It is advisable to wear a helmet.
GLOBAL_btn_caractpoints: You have {{caractPointsNb}} skill points to add.
SCENES_titles_frontdj: In front of the DarkBlue Dunjeon
SCENES_scene_text_1:
Here you are in the village tavern, a place of depravity, but also a meeting place for any adventurer looking for a challenge.
In an incessant hubbub, the smell of alcohol and pipe weed mix. One can hear debates, bickering between peasants. This has the effect of annoying the high-level adventurers who are sitting at the back table with their pint of beer, playing cards.
SCENES_scene_text_2: In front of the table of quests and despite a wide range of challenge intensity, one in particular catches your attention.
SCENES_scene_text_4: You inquire at the tavern keeper to have more information about the quest...
SCENES_scene_text_5: Edwar, a highly powerful magician, has been dislodged from his dungeon by one of the legendary dragons. He is looking for a team of adventurers to defeat the dragon and regain control of his dungeon and his powers...
SCENES_scene_text_6: Today you are lucky, Edwar is here! Feel free to join him at his table.
SCENES_scene_text_7: You came for my quest or to play cards, they say I'm the best at cards.
SCENES_scene_text_8: You beat me! All right, what do you want from me ?
SCENES_scene_text_9: Rage!!! One of the legendary dragons chased me out of my own dungeon, while sealing my magic. I have no choice to seek out powerful adventurers, a lot of danger awaits you...
SCENES_scene_text_10: Um... Yes, yes. You seem to be a great match for me, you'll have to go up on the roof to fight the Dragon. By the way, you didn't introduce yourself?
SCENES_scene_text_11: I do feel a huge potential, but you won't be more than two for this adventure. Here, I offer you 3000 gold coins to recruit another hero in this tavern.
SCENES_scene_text_12: Hold the key to the Dungeon, good luck.
SCENES_scene_text_13: You get the key to the DarkBlue Dungeon
SCENES_scene_text_14: A fight breaks out, two farmers assault your team
SCENES_scene_text_15: You have won, the fight are quiet. The wizard disappeared mysteriously when your back was turned (feel free to equip yourself and select your spells in the menu before starting the quest).
SCENES_scene_text_16: In front of the dungeon, lost in the middle of the cursed forest. A forest where it is very dark, populated by dead trees, blood-drinking monsters, you can hear the cries of crows and see vultures circling around the dungeon, patiently waiting for the corpses thrown out. A huge door stands between you and the quest, a door made of pure silver that is unthinkable to open by force.
SCENES_scene_text_17: Your team is entering inside the dungeon, it is very dark, candles along the walls light up as you enter. As soon as you can make out the dungeon's decorations, you hear footsteps accelerating in your direction. A group of goblins is attacking you (it is advisable to study your opponent team and prepare your team before a fight).
SCENES_scene_text_18: The door closes, you find yourself entering. In front of you, the corridor continues but it gets darker, it is quite impossible to see far away.... But there is a very powerful and threatening atmosphere, it would be better to be prepared before continuing to go deeper into the corridor. On the left a second corridor, you can see a door at the end, guarded by a Cyclops who seems to be very powerful. Finally, on your right, a door where we can see written 'Office'.
SCENES_scene_text_19: The Cyclops stands between you and a door. Nervous, from the top of his two meters and his two tons of muscle, his only eye stares at you. He has pinkish skin, his weapon is a heavy club that he holds with one hand. On the door you can see the word 'Store'.
SCENES_scene_text_20: The door is closed, "Stranger, answer this difficult riddle and you can finally stuff yourself properly!!!".
SCENES_scene_text_21: Your answer is right, the door opens
SCENES_scene_text_22: Welcome to the store my friend, I invite you to see the equipment I have in stock. Come back to see me at each level I'll have more to offer you.... Hum, now that I think about it, I don't often have guests here. Would you like to play a card game? You will be rewarded if you win.
SCENES_scene_text_23: Congratulations, it was a great game, a promise is a promise. I give you the access code to the safe room on the second floor. There are three guards, it is imperative to defeat them in the card game to have an access to the safe. Tell them that you are coming from Liglo!
SCENES_scene_text_24: Feel free to have a look at my store before you leave.
SCENES_scene_text_25: You are at the entrance. In front of you, the corridor continues but it gets darker, it is quite impossible to see far away.... But there is a very powerful and threatening atmosphere, it would be better to be prepared before continuing to go deeper into the corridor. On the left the corridor leading directly to the store. Finally, on your right, a door where we can see written 'Office'.
SCENES_scene_text_26: You sink into the corridor, you can see the staircase that leads to the second floor .... An orc blocks your way, the first thing you see is his fiery green eyes. He is tall, imposing, muscles two to three times bigger than a man. It's not just any orc, he has a wizard's staff as a weapon, a mage orc. He has bad eyesight, take advantage of it.
SCENES_scene_text_27: A fireplace containing a bright orange fire, illuminates the office, the wood crackles. In the middle of the room is a long desk in solid wood carved by hand, there rests a typewriter with a sheet inserted in it. One reads a story written by a certain Adams, a call for help to save his family.
BUTTONS_scene_action_text_check-quete: Request more information about the quest
BUTTONS_interes_quest: I'd like to execute your quest
BUTTONS_goenter: Going back to the dungeon entrance
QUEST_main_description:
Edwar, an old and highly powerful witcher, was kicked out of his own dungeon by one of the legendary dragons. After a 10-day battle, the dragon sucked out all of the wizard's powers. Edwar hates adventurers, which makes sense as a dungeon master. However, he has no choice to seek out adventurers to regain control of his dungeon. "100,000 gold coins to whoever slays the dragon, guardian of my Dungeon. The DarkBlue Dungeon".

Unfortunately, you will have to face all the dangers that lurk in the dungeon: Goblins, Orcs, Cyclops, anything that might repel adventurers from entering the dwelling of Edwar, The Magician, to find yourself on the roof and face the hideous Dragon. "Many challenges await you, be vigilant adventurer this dungeon has never fallen yet, good luck to you. You who throw yourself into this perilous adventure". PS: It is absolutely forbidden to take the dungeon treasure chest, this is not the purpose of this mission. "Watch out if I find my empty chest, my revenge will be terrible!"
QUEST_treasurechestquest_description: On the second floor, there is the treasure room. The password to enter is 'Mellon'. Once in the treasure room you will face three guards, to get access to the safe, you will have to face them one by one with the card game. However, you have been forbidden to take the contents of the safe by Edwar, so think twice before taking advantage of the gullible guards.
FIGHTGAME_winview_resume: Summary of what you have won.
FIGHTGAME_startText_fight_text_1: Why are you looking at us wrong?
FIGHTGAME_startText_fight_text_6: I have been charged with guarding the staircase that leads to the second floor. You are not welcome in this dungeon, leave or be damned !

FIGHTGAME_texts_applyEffect_fire: • {{target}} is burnt and lost {{value}} hp

FIGHTGAME_texts_applyEffect_dizzy: • {{target}} is stunned and skips is turn

FIGHTGAME_texts_diceEffect_negative: • {{target}}, its chances of failure increase by {{value}}
FIGHTGAME_texts_diceEffect_positive: • {{target}} has its chance of criticism increase by {{value}}

FIGHTGAME_applyEffect_dizzy: {{target}} is stunned and skips his turn
CARDGAME_start_logic: The person who drew the best card in the first round starts. In case of a tie, a draw is made.
CARDGAME_resultequal: The game ends in a tie
CARDGAME_dragoncard: {{gamername}} has drawn the dragon card and wins the game
CARDGAME_gamefinish_loose: The game is over, you lost
CARDGAME_gamefinish_win: The game is end, you win !
CARDGAME_gamefinish_equal: the game is over on a tie
CARDGAMERULE_rules:
The rules of the game are easy. You must draw cards to reach (or come as close as possible to) the value. {{maxValue}}.

You compete against an AI, the number of rounds is defined and displayed below the name of each competitor.

You will have to pay attention to your total value and the one of your enemy, colored in orange

  • If the sum of a player's cards exceeds {{maxValue}} the player has automatically lost
  • If both players pass their turn the game ends
  • In case of a tie, each player gets one point
  • If a player draws the 'Dragon' card then the player has automatically won the round
ELEMENTS_ice_description: The ice element greatly increases initiative and magical power. Ideal for a very powerful magician.
ELEMENTS_earth_description: The earth element increases life, armor and slightly physical damage. Interesting for a tank character.
ELEMENTS_fire_description: The fire element increases healing as well as slightly increases armor and life, ideal for the group healer.
ELEMENTS_wind_description: The wind element greatly increases initiative and physical damage. Ideal for an assassin.
SKILLS_physical_basic_attack_description: Basic physical attack, you hit with a sword.
SKILLS_physical_shuriken_description: Sends several dagger that could make the enemy bleed.
SKILLS_physical_explosion_description: An explosion from your body hurts yourself and your enemy.
SKILLS_physical_thor_hammer_description: You hit with a huge hammer, can stun your target.
SKILLS_physical_earth_sword_description: You hit with a huge, heavy sword causing earth element damage.
SKILLS_physical_wind_sword_description: You hit with a huge, heavy sword causing wind element damage.
SKILLS_magical_fire_rain_description: Create a rain of fire that can burn the enemy.
SKILLS_magical_ice_stalactite_descriptio: Throw several ice stalactites so that they freeze an enemy.
SKILLS_magical_ray_of_fire_description: You create a destructive fire ray.
SKILLS_magical_ray_of_ice_description: You create a destructive ice ray.
SKILLS_magical_rock_fire_description: Throws a flaming rock that lowers the target's fire resistance by 10% of the spell's damage.
SKILLS_spell_invocation_zombie_suicide_d: A zombie is invoked and sacrifices itself to damage an enemy
SKILLS_spell_mist_description: Invokes a fog around your target which increases the failure rate of the die by 1. IMPORTANT: can be accumulated 2 times maximum.
SKILLS_spell_shield_shared_description: Increases physical and magical defense for you and an ally.
SKILLS_spell_big_heal_description: A care for you or an ally.
SKILLS_spell_medium_heal_description: A care for you or an ally.
SKILLS_spell_invocation_caregiver_descri: Elae the healer is a summoner who take care of you and your allies
RIDDLE_potion: Liquid medicine intended to be drunk.
FIGHTGAME_loose: Defeat, try to modify your equipments/spells
SKILLS_spell_info: In case of a critical move a spell, you will be able to attack
SCENES_scene_text_60001: Edwar is sitting on a table at the entrance, dressed all in black, face hidden by his hood, we can feel a very powerful emanating from him. He is tall, imposing, smoking his pipe, his stick to keep him company. Not just any stick, a very worked and shining wood, surely a high level stick. He gives the impression of not wanting to be disturbed. Smoking his pipe, Edwar scans every coming and going at the entrance of the tavern, maybe looking for his savior?
FIGHTGAME_startText_fight_text_2: We shakedown all the noobs who cross this dungeon  !!
SCENES_scene_text_19001: The Cyclops stands between you and a door. Nervous, from the top of his two meters and his two tons of muscle, his only eye stares at you. He has pinkish skin, his weapon is a heavy club that he holds with one hand. On the door you can see the word 'Store'.
QUEST_famillyadams_description: Reader of my story, I introduce myself : I am the DarkBlue's owner, Sir. Adams. For years we lived there with my family: me, my wife and my son. Years in total happiness. When an old lady rang our doorbell, begging for hospitality for the night. A very strange woman, one could have thought at once of a witch. It was my duty, as a father, to protect my family and thus deny this person access to my place. But the next day, my son said he saw a specter, and little by little, his behavior changed. After a while, he became unrecognizable, he made an attempt to kill his own mother. Resigning myself to denounce him to justice, I had to lock him up in the room below the office. The story doesn't end there, in fact, right after my son it was my wife who was transformed. I am afraid that I have only a short time left before I become this horrible monster. If you read my story, make sure you avenge my family. If you see us in another form, fight it.
SCENES_scene_text_29: There is a child, chained, he looks unconscious. But when he sees you, the child reacts, he gets up...
SCENES_scene_text_30: Hi stranger.... I'm tired, starving.... Help me, free me, my father was completely crazy. Did you read his biography? That's right, I can see it in your eyes. Don't believe it, he spent his days writing with his machine. Put an end to this madness, free me from my chains.
SCENES_scene_text_31: The child is free.... But something happens, screams, blood... The child Adams transforms himself.... He takes a demonic form, a black horned monster, red eyes, long claws. The monster is on all fours ready to fight you.
FIGHTGAME_startText_fight_text_5: You made a big mistake in freeing me, you think you can fulfill my father's mission?
SCENES_scene_text_32: You have defeated the son Adams, to finish the quest you will have to find his mother. Finally, the specter will reveal itself to you.
SCENES_scene_text_28: The fireplace slides into the room, revealing a hidden path, a staircase leading to a cellar.
GLOBAL_boss_info: Bosses can hide their equipment and spells. During the game, they play after each of your heroes.
SCENES_scene_text_34:
The demo is finished, congratulations and thank you. To continue the development of the game, it's important to let a true feedback on the stores. Being the only developer I need to know more to invest myself on the project. You can join the discord for more information.
Coming soon: new mini-games, recruiting an ally, more equipment and spells, new rewarding fights and developing the story of the DarkBlue Dungeon world.

Finish the arena to register your rank among all players.
FIGHTGAME_texts_appendArmorPhysicalMagic: • {{target}} win {{value}} gains in physical and magical resistance
FIGHTGAME_confirm_surrend: Are you sure you want to quit?
FIGHT_no_target_info: Nobody can be reach with this spell
ARENA_message:
Welcome to the arena, here you will fight your way to the end and register your rank.
At the end of each fight you win your heroes take a level, you can equip yourself for free with all the equipment available in the game.
You are currently at the {{step}} stage on {{maxstep}}.
FIGHTGAME_arena_win: You won, go to the next step
SCENES_scene_text_35: You have unlocked the arena at the Home
MESSAGE_locale_not_native_support: The selected language is not translated by a human but an AI (LibreTranslate). We cannot guarantee the quality and accuracy of the text.
SCORING_form_header: Enter a nickname to register your rank in the database
SCORING_share_message:
I am the number {{score}} to have finished the DarkBlue Dungeon.
Available for download in the stores.
SCORING_share_subject: I have finished the DarkBlue Dungeon
TUTORIAL_fight_waiting_list: Battles are turn-based, the line-up is generated according to the initiative of the participants fighting
TUTORIAL_fight_see_my_team: Before each fight you have the possibility to see the details of your opponent's team thanks to the button "See the group of enemies", as well as to modify the equipment and the spells of your team thanks to the button "See my team" or directly in the menu at the top left
TUTORIAL_fight_turn: During your turn you will have the choice between making an attack or executing a spell
TUTORIAL_fight_effect_blood: Injures at each turn and divides the care received by two
TUTORIAL_fight_effect_ice: Passes the target's turn to play
TUTORIAL_fight_heroes_spell_info: Your heroes have the possibility to have 4 attacks and 4 spells.
TUTORIAL_fight_heroes_spell_choice_info: The choice of attacks, spells and equipments is not definitive. You can change them at any time by clicking directly on their cards.
TUTORIAL_fight_heroes_status_in_fight: In battle you can see the status of your heroes and enemies by clicking directly on their cards in the line
TUTORIAL_fight_heroes_end_fight: At the end of a won battle, you have a summary of what you have won in terms of currency, experience and equipment. Your heroes may have gained a level.
TUTORIAL_fight_heroes_lvl_up: For each level you gain, you have 10 skill points to allocate to each item. Also check if you have unlocked a new spell or a new attack!
TUTORIAL_fight_heroes_competence_points: The distributed skill points are permanent unless you use a specific item
TUTORIAL_fight_boss_cap1: Bosses have multiple abilities, they can hide their spells, attacks and equipments.
TUTORIAL_fight_boss_cap2: They always start first and play after each of your heroes.
TUTORIAL_fight_boss_cap3: They may also start with a bonus and have a hidden weakness.
TUTORIAL_fight_save: The fights are automatically saved at each turn, you can come back later to finish it.
ARENA_end: Congratulations, you have finished the arena and therefore the demo. Register your rank on the internet so that you know how many people have finished the game.
TUTORIAL_touchFight_resume:
You are facing an enormous number of goblins, you have to destroy them all by clicking on their images.
It is advised for this mini game to turn on the sound.
SKILLS_spell_shield_shared_medium_descri: Increases physical and magical defense for you and an ally.
FIGHTGAME_texts_FIGHT_pass_turn: • Can't use a spell {{target}} skips his turn
